title: A name on the wall
premise: Chain start: a message that sets up a later payoff.

stages.narration: Someone has scratched into the paint at the base of the water tower, deep, with a key or a blade: DELACROIX — WE WENT TO THE CHAPEL. WAIT FOR US. The letters are careful. Whoever cut them had time, and meant it to outlast them.

choices.label: Read it, remember it, and move on
Not your people, not your problem

effects.note: passed the name on the wall by

choices.label: Cut your own name beneath theirs, and a heading

effects.note: added a name to the wall for whoever comes next

notes: Reading sets chain.terraces.name-seen now and schedules chain.terraces.time-passed for +24h; both gate the payoff. The third approach (mark) is a humane trace with no chain effect — FR-CNT-04 Rule of Three at this location.
